data.body:
All child work delivered. Report items #1-#7 landed via Gerrit changes 896/897/898 (merged to origin/main at 067276f5b/71fbabae4/adbdc5f49). Item #8 (packaged explain guides) was already fixed independently on main as c2bfbe217 (ticket bea1); duplicate child d109 closed and Gerrit change 895 abandoned. Net delivered:
  • #2/#6: review-plan --status read-only currency query (exit 0 current / 12 stale-absent) + idempotent-reuse text marker; --check help disambiguated (9603)
  • #1: reviewed_at ns-epoch timestamp on audit show's plan_reviews history (e996)
  • #1/#3/#4/#5/#7: docs for the boolean currency rule, the two staleness axes, --status, and audit-show-is-history-not-status (8d9a)
Also resolved a module-size overflow by splitting attest.py's gate surface into attest_gate.py (behind change 896). All three changes passed LLM-Review +1 and Verified +1 before submit.
